title: Trump Warns Tehran After Strike on Iranian Bridge
summary: Trump threatens further action after a strike destroys Iran's largest bridge, escalating tensions.
charlotte_impact: Heightened conflict risks destabilizing the region and drawing the US into a larger military engagement.

title: Trump Ousted Pam Bondi Against Her Wishes

title: Trump Threatens to Break NATO Promise Over Iran

title: U.S. Jobs Growth Surges Past Expectations in March
